LightningComponentBundle.description: AI Document Splitter — classifies and splits a multi-page PDF bundle into individual typed documents using a vision prompt.

property.name: libraryId
property.label: Library Id (optional)
property.description: ContentWorkspace Id where split files will be saved. Leave blank to auto-detect from the source file's library.

property.name: chunkSize
property.label: Deprecated Page Chunk Size
property.description: Deprecated no-op retained for existing Lightning pages. Current splitter chunks by byte size only.

property.name: chunkOverlap
property.label: Legacy Chunk Overlap
property.description: Legacy page overlap setting. Current size-based splitter always uses zero overlap.
